Home / Services / Electrical Panel Upgrades

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Ensure your home's electrical system can handle today's power demands.

Is your electrical panel outdated or struggling to keep up with your family's power needs? Many older Columbus homes, particularly in areas like Clintonville and German Village, still have outdated electrical panels that were not designed for modern appliances and technology. Reli Electric specializes in electrical panel upgrades and replacements, ensuring your home's electrical system is safe, reliable, and capable of handling the demands of today's power-hungry devices.

We'll assess your current electrical panel, determine the appropriate size and capacity for your home, and install a new, code-compliant panel that meets all your electrical needs. We handle everything from obtaining permits to disposing of your old panel safely. Don't risk overloading your electrical system – upgrade to a modern panel and enjoy peace of mind knowing your home is protected.

Upgrade your electrical panel with Reli Electric and experience the difference. We'll ensure your home is ready for the future, with a reliable electrical system that can handle all your power needs.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Assess your current electrical panel and electrical needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: Provide a detailed estimate for the panel upgrade or replacement.
  3. 03 Step 3: Obtain necessary permits and schedule the installation.
  4. 04 Step 4: Install the new electrical panel and ensure it meets all safety codes.

Benefits

  • Increased safety and reliability
  • Accommodate modern appliances and technology
  • Prevent electrical overloads
  • Improve home value

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?

Common signs include frequently tripped breakers, flickering lights, and difficulty running multiple appliances at once. If you're experiencing any of these issues, it's time to call Reli Electric.

How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?

The installation process typically takes one day, but it can vary depending on the complexity of the job. We'll provide a more accurate timeline during the estimate.

Is it safe to attempt an electrical panel upgrade myself?

Absolutely not. Electrical work is dangerous and should only be performed by a licensed and qualified electrician. Contact Reli Electric for safe and reliable panel upgrades.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical panel upgrades? Contact us today.
